categories.description: No same-day scheduled catalyst, no systemic stress, and no elevated volatility rule hit.
rules: VIX below 25 unless another explicit unknown or block rule fires.
VIX/VXV term structure is not inverted by the v11 threshold.
News context is quiet, already digested, future-dated, after close, or non-market operational wording.

categories.description: Same-day scheduled macro, earnings, auction, or ambiguous event risk where the strategy should not rely on raw LLM confidence.
rules: Same-day CPI, PCE, jobs, FOMC, Powell, Fed decision, Treasury auction, or earnings-heavy references are unknown.
Future-dated references are allow unless same-day markers keep a relevant event active.
Prior-day scheduled references are allow unless another rule fires.

categories.description: Volatility is elevated or inverted without enough evidence to classify as systemic tail risk.
rules: VIX >= 25 is unknown unless a block rule fires.
VIX >= 20 and VIX/VXV >= 1.05 is unknown unless a block rule fires.

categories.description: Systemic, disorderly, SPY/index halt, war, crash, panic, or VIX >= 30 risk.
rules: Systemic banking crisis, war shock, market panic, index futures halt, or SPY ETF halt risk is block.
Non-systemic or future/after-close halt references may be allow when explicitly scoped away from SPY intraday risk.
